name: Carlos
text: Welcome to the HCOS wireframe. Tap Feedback on any screen — your notes save instantly in your browser, and 'Send to Carlos' gets them onto this shared board for everyone.

name: Carlos
text: Is the 30-minute grid right for the infusion chairs, or do you book chairs on the hour? The columns and the Infusion Suite band follow what we mapped — say so if the real day looks different.
